com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.model

Class Identifier

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.model.Identifier

  • public class Identifier
extends java.lang.Object
    A solution to set plugin-name:tag=value PDC value for all versions even before 1.14, which is not supported by Bukkit API.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Identifier(java.lang.String tagName, Plugin plugin, java.lang.String tagValue)
      Creates an Identifier with the specified tag name and tag value.
      Identifier(java.lang.String tagName, java.lang.String tagValue)
      Creates an Identifier with the specified tag name and tag value.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ItemStack apply(ItemStack origin)
      Applies this Identifier to the given ItemStack by setting the specified tag name and tag value in the item's NBT data.
      boolean equals(java.lang.Object object) 
      boolean isItem(ItemStack stack)
      Checks if the given ItemStack has this Identifier applied by comparing the tag value in the item's NBT data with this Identifier's tag value.
      java.lang.String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this Identifier in the format "tagValue:tagName".

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • Identifier

        public Identifier(java.lang.String tagName,
                  Plugin plugin,
                  java.lang.String tagValue)
        Creates an Identifier with the specified tag name and tag value. The tag value is prefixed with the plugin name to ensure uniqueness across different plugins.
        Parameters:
        tagName - the name of the tag to be used in the item's NBT data
        plugin - the plugin whose name will be used as a prefix for the tag value
        tagValue - the value of the tag, which will be combined with the plugin name to create a unique identifier
        Throws:
        java.lang.UnsupportedOperationException - if the tag value does not match the required pattern

      • Identifier

        public Identifier(java.lang.String tagName,
                  java.lang.String tagValue)
        Creates an Identifier with the specified tag name and tag value. This constructor does not prefix the tag value with a plugin name, so it should be used with caution to avoid conflicts between different plugins.
        Parameters:
        tagName - the name of the tag to be used in the item's NBT data
        tagValue - the value of the tag, which should be unique across all plugins to avoid conflicts
        Throws:
        java.lang.UnsupportedOperationException - if the tag value does not match the required pattern

    • Method Detail

      • apply

        public ItemStack apply(ItemStack origin)
        Applies this Identifier to the given ItemStack by setting the specified tag name and tag value in the item's NBT data.
        Parameters:
        origin - the ItemStack to which this Identifier will be applied
        Returns:
        the modified ItemStack with the Identifier applied

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        Returns a string representation of this Identifier in the format "tagValue:tagName".
        Overrides:
        toString in class java.lang.Object
        Returns:
        a string representation of this Identifier

      • equals

        public boolean equals(java.lang.Object object)
        Overrides:
        equals in class java.lang.Object

      • isItem

        public boolean isItem(ItemStack stack)
        Checks if the given ItemStack has this Identifier applied by comparing the tag value in the item's NBT data with this Identifier's tag value.
        Parameters:
        stack - the ItemStack to check for this Identifier
        Returns:
        true if the ItemStack has this Identifier applied, false otherwise
